title: Job Vacancies at Shawsand Medical Centre
content:
Shawsand Medical Centre is a world-class medical facility located in Port Harcourt. We have different medical equipment that aids us in treating our patients and various surgical procedures. Our staff are highly trained and dedicated towards their work. We are computerized and this makes the jobeasier. It also ensures continuity. We at Shawsand Medical Centre have chosen to adopt this model of patient care in Nigeria in our areas of focus, utilizing the state-of-the-artequipment in our facility and local, national, and international expertise that is available to provide solutions to our patients' problems.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Billing / Accounts Officer 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a diligent and detail-oriented Accounts/Billing Officer to join our hospital’s finance team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for managing billing operations for HMO, corporate clients, and walk-in patients, as well as supporting general accounting and record-keeping activities.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and process bills for HMO, corporate, and walk-in patients.
	Reconcile patient and client accounts, ensuring accurate billing and timely collections.
	Manage hospital receivables and maintain proper financial records.
	Support accounting functions such as petty cash management, store documentation, and daily account reconciliation.
	Liaise with HMOs and corporate clients to resolve billing or payment issues.
	Assist with monthly and year-end financial reports


Required Qualifications & Skills


	OND / HND in Accounting or related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience as a Billing or Accounts Officer (preferably in a healthcare or HMO environment).
	Strong knowledge of billing, receivables management, and basic accounting principles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Excellent attention to detail, organization, and numerical accuracy.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.


Other Requirements:


	Must be dependable, honest, and able to work with minimal supervision.
	A good understanding of hospital billing systems and HMO procedures is an added advantage.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / month

Application Closing Date: 30th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Marketing Manager 

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Contract

Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement marketing strategies to secure partnerships with corporate organizations and Health Maintenance Organizations (HMOs).
	Drive client acquisition and build long-term business relationships for hospital services.
	Conduct market research to identify new opportunities and business leads.
	Prepare and deliver compelling proposals and presentations to prospective clients.
	Manage end-to-end business development activities, from lead generation to contract signing.
	Monitor and report on marketing and client acquisition performance.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, HND, or Bachelor's Degree with3-5 years of relevant experience.
	Proven experience in healthcare marketing, preferably with hospitals or HMOs.
	Strong network and track record of securing corporate and HMO partnerships.
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills.
	Ability to work independently and deliver measurable results within a short timeframe.
	(6-Month Contract).


 Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 30th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.)  Radiographer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Perform diagnostic imaging procedures including Ultrasound, X-ray, and ECG
	Ensure accurate image acquisition and proper documentation
	Operate and maintain imaging equipment in line with safety standards
	Adhere to radiation protection and patient care protocols
	Provide professional support and clear communication to patients
	Collaborate effectively with physicians and other healthcare staff.


Requirements


	Valid professional license as a Radiographer
	Proven experience in Ultrasound, X-ray, and ECG
	Strong attention to detail and patient-focused approach
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires, contact 08052097250.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Officer",
  "description": "Stellar International Company Limited is a subsidiary of RSIN Group which entered Africa in 2008. Stellar International Co. Ltd has three businesses, namely Recycling Ant, Ant Express and Antshop Online.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Onitsha, Anambra
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
Partnership Development:


	Identify and approach manufacturers and dealers who align with our recycling company and target market.
	Negotiate terms, pricing, and agreements with potential partners to ensure mutually beneficial outcomes.
	Build and maintain long-term relationships with manufacturers and dealers to ensure ongoing partnerships.


Market Research:


	Conduct thorough market research to identify potential suppliers in different industries.
	Stay up-to-date with trends in manufacturing, product demand, and market shifts to target the right partners.


Onboarding &amp; Integration:


	Facilitate the seamless onboarding of manufacturers and dealers onto the recycling company
	Collaborate with internal teams to integrate supplier products, ensuring they are accurately listed, categorized, and promoted.


Sales Growth:


	Drive sales by expanding the product range and ensuring a steady supply of high-quality products from various manufacturers.
	Work closely with the marketing and operations teams to maximize exposure and sales for new partners.


Performance Monitoring:


	Track and analyze the performance of onboarded manufacturers and dealers to ensure they meet sales targets and customer satisfaction.
	Provide feedback and support to partners to help them optimize their product listings and sales performance.


Compliance &amp; Quality Control:


	Ensure that all products from partnered manufacturers and dealers meet quality, safety, and legal standards required for the platform.


Requirements


	Must have a cognate experience in business development (at least 3 years)
	Must have worked or have experience in a recycling company
	Must be a BSc/HND holder in Business admin,Marketing or any related courses.


Benefits


	Salary: N150,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;
	Transportation: N3,000 daily.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;stellarinternationalhr@gmail.com&nbsp;cc:&nbsp;isreal@hengxingcompany.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.",

Business Development Officer Job at Stellar International Company Limited




        
    

        
        Stellar International Company Limited is a subsidiary of RSIN Group which entered Africa in 2008. Stellar International Co. Ltd has three businesses, namely Recycling Ant, Ant Express and Antshop Online.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer
Job Location: Onitsha, Anambra
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
Partnership Development:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and approach manufacturers and dealers who align with our recycling company and target market.
	Negotiate terms, pricing, and agreements with potential partners to ensure mutually beneficial outcomes.
	Build and maintain long-term relationships with manufacturers and dealers to ensure ongoing partnerships.


Market Research:


	Conduct thorough market research to identify potential suppliers in different industries.
	Stay up-to-date with trends in manufacturing, product demand, and market shifts to target the right partners.


Onboarding & Integration:


	Facilitate the seamless onboarding of manufacturers and dealers onto the recycling company
	Collaborate with internal teams to integrate supplier products, ensuring they are accurately listed, categorized, and promoted.


Sales Growth:


	Drive sales by expanding the product range and ensuring a steady supply of high-quality products from various manufacturers.
	Work closely with the marketing and operations teams to maximize exposure and sales for new partners.


Performance Monitoring:


	Track and analyze the performance of onboarded manufacturers and dealers to ensure they meet sales targets and customer satisfaction.
	Provide feedback and support to partners to help them optimize their product listings and sales performance.


Compliance & Quality Control:


	Ensure that all products from partnered manufacturers and dealers meet quality, safety, and legal standards required for the platform.


Requirements


	Must have a cognate experience in business development (at least 3 years)
	Must have worked or have experience in a recycling company
	Must be a BSc/HND holder in Business admin,Marketing or any related courses.


Benefits


	Salary: N150,000 - N200,000 per month. 
	Transportation: N3,000 daily.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] cc: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior B2B Sales Leader",
  "description": "Tailored Talent -&nbsp;Our client in a Home service and technology industry is expanding its enterprise and strategic partnerships across telecommunications, infrastructure, facility management, and large-scale services in Nigeria.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior B2B Sales Leader
Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	And they are seeking a senior B2B sales leader with a proven track record of closing complex, high-value enterprise deals and engaging confidently at C-suite level.
	This is not a junior sales, SDR, or lead-generation role. It is a hands-on, founder-proxy position focused on opening doors, structuring partnerships, and closing long-cycle enterprise agreements.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead enterprise and strategic partnership discussions end-to-end
	Engage directly with CEOs, VPs, and Heads of Operations
	Structure pilots, commercial terms, and long-cycle deals
	Navigate complex buying processes and enterprise procurement structures
	Work closely with the founder to close and scale key accounts
	Identify, qualify, and prioritize high-impact enterprise partnership opportunities aligned with long-term growth objectives
	Manage post-close handover and relationship continuity to ensure successful onboarding and account expansion
	Provide market intelligence and strategic feedback from enterprise clients to inform product, pricing, and service decisions.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, or a related field (MBA or advanced degree is an advantage)
	8+ years of experience in B2B or enterprise sales, partnerships, or business development
	Proven record of personally closing high-value, complex enterprise deals
	Professionals comfortable with autonomy, accountability, and minimal supervision
	Strong experience selling services, infrastructure, or complex B2B solutions
	Demonstrated ability to engage and negotiate at C-suite and board level
	Deep understanding of long sales cycles, pilots, procurement, and contract negotiations
	Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills
	Strong commercial acumen with the ability to structure win&ndash;win partnerships
	Experience operating in startup or high-growth environments is a plus.


Salary
N750,000 per month.&nbsp;",

Senior B2B Sales Leader Job at Tailored Talent




        
    

        
        Tailored Talent - Our client in a Home service and technology industry is expanding its enterprise and strategic partnerships across telecommunications, infrastructure, facility management, and large-scale services in Nigeria.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior B2B Sales Leader
Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	And they are seeking a senior B2B sales leader with a proven track record of closing complex, high-value enterprise deals and engaging confidently at C-suite level.
	This is not a junior sales, SDR, or lead-generation role. It is a hands-on, founder-proxy position focused on opening doors, structuring partnerships, and closing long-cycle enterprise agreements.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead enterprise and strategic partnership discussions end-to-end
	Engage directly with CEOs, VPs, and Heads of Operations
	Structure pilots, commercial terms, and long-cycle deals
	Navigate complex buying processes and enterprise procurement structures
	Work closely with the founder to close and scale key accounts
	Identify, qualify, and prioritize high-impact enterprise partnership opportunities aligned with long-term growth objectives
	Manage post-close handover and relationship continuity to ensure successful onboarding and account expansion
	Provide market intelligence and strategic feedback from enterprise clients to inform product, pricing, and service decisions.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, or a related field (MBA or advanced degree is an advantage)
	8+ years of experience in B2B or enterprise sales, partnerships, or business development
	Proven record of personally closing high-value, complex enterprise deals
	Professionals comfortable with autonomy, accountability, and minimal supervision
	Strong experience selling services, infrastructure, or complex B2B solutions
	Demonstrated ability to engage and negotiate at C-suite and board level
	Deep understanding of long sales cycles, pilots, procurement, and contract negotiations
	Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills
	Strong commercial acumen with the ability to structure win–win partnerships
	Experience operating in startup or high-growth environments is a plus.


Salary
N750,000 per month.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Maintenance Technician",
  "description": "Recore Limited is an outsourcing/consulting firm in human resources management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Technician
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Plant Assistant / General Maintenance:
Health &amp; Safety:


	Ensure full compliance of the plant with safety standards.
	Promote safety awareness in the operation of heavy plant equipment in the presence of ground personnel.
	Conduct at least two VFLs monthly.


Operations:


	Ensure the plant is operational and ready for production.
	Carry out daily, weekly, and monthly maintenance of the plant using the checklist.
	Ensure the operation of all generators on the plant.
	Respond to plant issues such as power outages, water shortages, tool supply inspection, and receipt.
	Provide technical assistance to contractors carrying out jobs in the plant.
	Report promptly on breakdowns, repairs, and work in progress in the plant.
	Maintain up-to-date records of uptime and downtime of trucks and plant assets on a daily and monthly basis.
	Maintain up-to-date records of hour meter readings and running time for all generators and trucks on a daily and monthly basis.
	Liaise with the workshop on maintenance and repair issues.
	Ensure production assistants are exposed to daily maintenance techniques and routines.
	Assist production in truck and driver coordination.
	Conduct general inspection of the plant, store area, and accommodation area.


Interaction:


	Coach, train, and guide direct reports to understand and follow Lafarge procedures.
	Adopt a proactive approach toward interaction between in-house departments within the plant.


Knowledge and Experience Requirements
Critical Knowledge:


	Good knowledge of occupational health and safety.
	Possession and maintenance of a valid driver&rsquo;s license.


Critical Experience:


	Minimum of two years of experience working as a maintenance mechanic at a concrete manufacturing plant.
	Completion of a recognized vocational education program in a related field, i.e., Mechanical, in an industrial setting.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications / CV to:&nbsp;recoreltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Maintenance Technician Job at Recore Limited




        
    

        
        Recore Limited is an outsourcing/consulting firm in human resources management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Maintenance Technician
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Plant Assistant / General Maintenance:
Health & Safety:


	Ensure full compliance of the plant with safety standards.
	Promote safety awareness in the operation of heavy plant equipment in the presence of ground personnel.
	Conduct at least two VFLs monthly.


Operations:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensure the plant is operational and ready for production.
	Carry out daily, weekly, and monthly maintenance of the plant using the checklist.
	Ensure the operation of all generators on the plant.
	Respond to plant issues such as power outages, water shortages, tool supply inspection, and receipt.
	Provide technical assistance to contractors carrying out jobs in the plant.
	Report promptly on breakdowns, repairs, and work in progress in the plant.
	Maintain up-to-date records of uptime and downtime of trucks and plant assets on a daily and monthly basis.
	Maintain up-to-date records of hour meter readings and running time for all generators and trucks on a daily and monthly basis.
	Liaise with the workshop on maintenance and repair issues.
	Ensure production assistants are exposed to daily maintenance techniques and routines.
	Assist production in truck and driver coordination.
	Conduct general inspection of the plant, store area, and accommodation area.


Interaction:


	Coach, train, and guide direct reports to understand and follow Lafarge procedures.
	Adopt a proactive approach toward interaction between in-house departments within the plant.


Knowledge and Experience Requirements
Critical Knowledge:


	Good knowledge of occupational health and safety.
	Possession and maintenance of a valid driver’s license.


Critical Experience:


	Minimum of two years of experience working as a maintenance mechanic at a concrete manufacturing plant.
	Completion of a recognized vocational education program in a related field, i.e., Mechanical, in an industrial setting.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications / CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

title: Operations & Logistics Officer Job at Pyfinest Resources
content:
Pyfinest Resources - Our client, a logistics powerhouse, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations & Logistics Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	This is not just an Officer role — it is a foundational leadership opportunity to optimize systems, drive efficiency, and ensure seamless logistics execution in a fast-paced environment.


 Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Plan, coordinate, and monitor logistics operations including transportation, warehousing, and distribution
	Track shipments, deliveries, and inventory levels; provide timely and accurate updates to clients
	Ensure compliance with company policies, safety standards, and regulatory requirements
	Maintain accurate inventory records and conduct periodic stock checks
	Manage company assets and ensure proper utilization and maintenance
	Prepare operational and logistics performance reports for management
	Analyze operational data to improve efficiency and reduce costs
	Coordinate with finance and other departments to achieve organizational objectives
	Ensure smooth day-to-day running of the Port Harcourt branch office


 Ideal Candidate Profile


	Bachelor’s degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum 3 years of experience in logistics/operations management
	Strong knowledge of transportation, fleet management, and warehousing systems
	Proven ability to manage teams and drive operational efficiency
	Strong analytical, reporting, and cost-control skills
	High level of accountability, structure, and leadership presence
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite especially Excel and logistics management tools


 What Makes This Role Attractive:


	Opportunity to lead the setup of a new branch
	Strategic role with high visibility and impact
	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives
	Career growth within a rapidly expanding logistics brand.


 Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Operations & Logistics Officer – Port Harcourt” as the subject of the mail

Note: Only candidates with verifiable logistics leadership experience will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
